theme: Servicing update with Metal and Xaml canvas fixes
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.1 is a servicing release fixing Metal disposal, iOS 15 compatibility, SKXamlCanvas issues and adding SKTypeface.PostScriptName.
highlights_body: It also lands zlib 1.3.0.1+, hardens the Windows binaries by splitting EGL and building the WinUI interop with static CRT, and picks up a handful of community fixes.

bullets.detail: Refreshes the bundled zlib to pick up upstream fixes.
Exposes the underlying PostScript font name so callers can identify the exact font instance a typeface resolves to.

bullets.lead: Metal on iOS 15 and lower no longer crashes
bullets.detail: Hotfix for a Metal backend regression that broke rendering on iOS versions before iOS 16.

bullets.lead: Metal SKMetalView disposal and re-initialization corrected
bullets.detail: Avoids initializing `SKMetalView` twice and confirms that disposing `GRContext` on the Metal backend no longer crashes.
`SKAutoCanvasRestore.Dispose` no longer crashes when the underlying canvas has already been disposed.

bullets.lead: SKXamlCanvas is transparent on Mac Catalyst
bullets.detail: Ensures `SKXamlCanvas` is not opaque on Mac Catalyst so overlays and translucent content render correctly.
Fixes a UTC/local time-zone bug in date-time conversion inside the bindings.
Builds EGL as Win32 and GLESv2 for the Windows App SDK, and builds the WinUI interop with `/MT` (static CRT) so the binaries have fewer runtime dependencies.

contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the double-init of `SKMetalView`, added the Metal `GRContext` dispose regression test and the UTC `DateTime` conversion fix
contributor_summaries.taublast: Hotfixed Metal on iOS 15 and lower and made `SKAutoCanvasRestore.Dispose` safe on an already-disposed canvas
contributor_summaries.pjcollins: Added CI triggers for the primary branches on `azure-pipelines-native`
contributor_summaries.spouliot: Fixed `SKXamlCanvas` being opaque on Mac Catalyst

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 rolled up every 3.119.1 change — the Metal disposal and iOS 15 hotfixes, the `SKAutoCanvasRestore`, `SKXamlCanvas` Mac Catalyst and UTC `DateTime` fixes, the new `SKTypeface.PostScriptName` API, and the zlib and Windows binary hardening — and cut the release candidate.
